title: Jurisdiction Claim Ledger
description: Central ledger of every non-obvious legal, tax, estate, regulatory, reporting, or direction-of-travel claim used anywhere in the product. Public-facing content may only use claims with status 'verified' or 'needs-review' (the latter only with cautious wording).

source_tier.description: Tier of the strongest supporting source.

human_review_required.description: True for tax rates, taxable events, inheritance/forced heirship, trusts, exit tax, reporting obligations, penalties, freezing/seizure, self-custody legality, advisor permissions, rankings, 'best jurisdiction' conclusions.

public_safe.description: Whether this claim may appear in public-facing content. Must be false unless status is verified or needs-review.

related_outputs.description: Profile fields, deep-dive modules, or routing rules that depend on this claim.

supersedes.description: claim_id this replaces, if status is 'replaced'.
